sections.paragraph:
- Original: Ἐλεάζαρ

- Transliteration: Eleazar

- Phonetic: el-eh-ad'-zar

- Definition: Eleazar = "help of God"

1. one of the ancestors of Christ

- Origin: of hebrew origin H499

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Of hebrew origin [H499]; Eleazar an Israelite: - Eleazar.
